fullOutput:
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix:    # Save devshell PATH, then source HM session vars (EDITOR, etc.)
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    _devshell_path="$PATH"
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    . "$HOME/.profile" 2>/dev/null || true
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    # .profile prepends HM sessionPath entries to PATH — move devshell paths back to front
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    # so devshell takes priority, with HM paths (e.g. ~/.local/bin) as fallback
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    _hm_prefix="''${PATH%:$_devshell_path}"
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    if [ "$_hm_prefix" != "$PATH" ]; then
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-      export PATH="$_devshell_path:$_hm_prefix"
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    fi
/home/user/code/nix-common.nix-    unset _devshell_path _hm_prefix
--
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix:    # Append Home Manager session paths (devshell paths take priority, HM paths as fallback)
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    _devshell_path="$PATH"
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    . "$HOME/.profile" 2>/dev/null || true
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    # .profile prepends HM sessionPath entries to PATH — move devshell paths back to front
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    _hm_prefix="''${PATH%:$_devshell_path}"
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    if [ "$_hm_prefix" != "$PATH" ]; then
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-      export PATH="$_devshell_path:$_hm_prefix"
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    fi
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-    unset _devshell_path _hm_prefix
/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix-  '';
